title: Popup
description: A dialog-like component that renders provided content in an overlay window. Opened via service with configurable size, header, backdrop and behavior.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using popup.

sections.title: Size
sections.description: Adjust popup size using the 'size' option when opening.

sections.title: Size In Screens
sections.description: Popup size table on different screens.

sections.title: Show Header
sections.description: Create a custom header or hide it with the 'header: false' option.

sections.title: Using Popup Service
sections.description: Open a popup via AXPopupService; method overloads only.

methods.content:
/**
 * Sets focus on the .ax-popup element within the host element after a short delay.
 */
focus(): void

/**
 * Closes the dialog, emitting component reference, host element, and optional data.
 * @param {unknown} [data]
 */
close(data?: unknown): void
